payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current active memory for Sam matching Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is explicitly superseded, so it should not be presented as current once a newer replacement memory exists.

entity_resolution.reason: The query targeted Sam, and recall selected the memory attached to the resolved Sam entity. The Goldman-associated record was the active, non-superseded memory for that entity.

memory_cards.statement: An older memory about Sam was filtered because it was marked superseded by the newer Goldman memory.

details: Found active matching memory mem_new connected to Goldman.
Applied recall policy to exclude superseded memories from current results.

repair_options: Verify that mem_old has a superseded/replaced status rather than active status.
Verify that mem_old points to mem_new via a superseded_by or replacement link.
If mem_old should still be recallable for history, expose it only in audit/debug views, not as current recall.
If mem_new was returned incorrectly, inspect entity resolution for Sam and any employer normalization for Goldman.

The Goldman-associated record was the active, non-superseded memory for that entity."},"conflict_classification":"supersession","answer":"Recall returned mem_new because it is the current active memory for Sam matching Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is explicitly superseded, so it should not be presented as current once a newer replacement memory exists.","citations":["mem_new","mem_old"],"repair_options":["Verify that mem_old has a superseded/replaced status rather than active status.","Verify that mem_old points to mem_new via a superseded_by or replacement link.","If mem_old should still be recallable for history, expose it only in audit/debug views, not as current recall.","If mem_new was returned incorrectly, inspect entity resolution for Sam and any employer normalization for Goldman."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Resolved query entity to Sam.","Found active matching memory mem_new connected to Goldman.","Detected mem_old as superseded.","Applied recall policy to exclude superseded memories from current results."]}}
